title: FriendMod
description: The best way to host a world for friends with support for Bedrock multiplayer, and a fully-fledged friend and chat system.
body:
![FriendMod Title Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e5587fc4aa6c0b592ddcfda24dad190ccf2d887.png)

# FriendMod
**FriendMod** makes playing with friends feel built into Minecraft. Keep up with your people, message them in-game, invite them instantly, and jump into each other's worlds without turning setup into a project.

## Why install it?
FriendMod is for players who want the easiest possible way to hang out in Minecraft.

- Keep a **friends list** right inside the game
- Send and accept **friend requests**
- Chat with friends without leaving Minecraft
- Send **world invites** and **server invites** directly in chat
- See when friends are around and what they are up to
- Spot when friends are already playing and join them faster
- Open your world to **Bedrock players on your local network**

No separate launcher. No awkward extra app. Just Minecraft.

## Built for actual friend groups
FriendMod is focused on the stuff people need every day:

- message a friend
- invite them into your world
- jump into their game
- see who's around
- keep conversations going between sessions

It turns Minecraft into more of a social space and less of a hassle.

## Extra touches
- Chat supports clickable links and media previews
- Built-in presence and notifications help you keep up with your friends
- Optional support for **Simple Voice Chat**
- Local **Bedrock LAN** support for mixed-device households

## Requirements
- **Minecraft:** 1.21.11
- **Loader:** Fabric
- **Java:** 21+
- **Requires:** Fabric API

## Notes
- FriendMod is a **client-side** mod
- Some online features require an internet connection and FriendMod services
